titleStmt.title: SII 39.20: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 20. (A.R. No. 20 of 1916.) SAṈṈAVAṈAM, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SĀLYAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE. •••••••••• TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN •••••••••• WHO WAS PLEASED TO TAKE ALL COUNTRIES-[18]TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription is in damaged condition. It records a gift of land as tax-free kārāṇmai for offering to the deity in the shrine of Tirukkāmakkōṭṭa-muḍaiya-Nāchchiyār of the same temple, by Śivanindakālaṉ Tirukkāṉappēruḍai[yā]ṉ alias Māḷavachakravarti who also figures as one of the signatories. The other signatories mentioned are Kulśēkhara viḻupparaiyaṉ, Śivanindakāla mūvēndavēḷāṉ alias Uttamapāṇḍya Brahmarāyaṉ and Gurukularāyaṉ etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
rāṉa tiripuvaṉṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Emaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya
ṇṭu 18vatu māḷavaccakaravatti Ōlai Uṭaiyārtiruccaṉṉa
ṉattāṟku cimāyecurakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkumāka
lā ciyār Eḻuntaruḷivikkiṟa tirukkāmak koṭṭa nācci yārk
ḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷu[kkaḷukkaku Inta
maṅkalappaṟṟil no nārāyaṇa nallūṟku Ellaiyā
vatu kiḻpāṟ kellai ma ṅkaḷa melellaikkum naṅkai Iraṇimel kkum meṟkum teṉpāṟ kellai
kuḷattil ni kiḻakku nokkip poṉa vaḻikku vaḻikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Uṭaiyār mummuṭi coḷicuramu
ṭaiya nāyaṉā vatāṉam velaṅkuḷattu kīḻkaraikkum Ivvayal teṉṉellaikkum kiḻakkum vaṭa pāṟke
llai Iv kkum Ālaṅkuḷattilem perumāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam coḻaṉ vayakkal te
ṉ varampukku ṉacanta perunāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum puṉceyum nattamum nattappālum
kuḷamum ppa yum maramuṅkiṇaṟum maṟṟumepperpaṭṭa camatta pirāppittikaḷukku mepperpaṭṭa viṟaikaḷum ta
vintu ṟaiyili kārāṇmaiyāka kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ celva
tāka llaiyilum tiruccūlakkallum nāṭṭik kallilum cempilum veṭṭikoḷka Ippaṭikku Ivai civaṉintakālaṉ tirukkāṉappe
ruṭaiyāṉāṉa māḷavaccakravatti Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kulacekara viḻupparaiya ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai civanintakāla muventaveḷāṉeḻu
ttu Ippaṭikku Ivai yātavarāyaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Uttamapāṇṭiya piramātarāya ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tikkuppiḷḷai Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai kurukularāya ṉeḻuttu Itu māheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 39.20 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
